title: Full Stack Development Trainee
description: As Neon Apps, we are a mobile app development company that serves thousands of users in 170 countries with over 50 different types of apps across 10 categories. Our goal is to provide our users with functional and user-friendly digital solutions developed using the latest technology. In line with this goal, we are looking for new team members who will add value to our team. You will have the opportunity to be involved in all stages of the mobile app and backend development processes, working closely with our experienced developers, UI/UX designers, and product managers, and getting to know our team's work culture. Your responsibilities will include: • Developing and maintaining backend services for mobile applications (Node.js, Firebase, RESTful APIs, etc.), • Supporting mobile app development with backend integrations, • Assisting with occasional web development tasks when needed, • Troubleshooting and improving existing backend systems, • Collaborating with the team to identify and solve technical challenges. Through Neon Apps' Neon Academy Program, you will receive comprehensive training for the first 2 months, improving your skills in backend and mobile-focused Full Stack development. After the training period, starting from the 3rd month, you will gain real-world experience by contributing to actual projects for 6 to 9 months, with the possibility of joining our team permanently. During this process, you will work at our Sarıyer office and benefit from transportation and meal support. We look forward to receiving applications from candidates who are eager, determined, and passionate about growing their careers in backend and mobile application development.

title: Yazılım Mühendisi (React, PLSQL)
description: ICterra, Münih, İstanbul ve Ankara'da ofisleri bulunan küresel bir yazılım mühendisliği şirketidir. 30 yıllık yazılım geliştirme deneyimini teknoloji uzmanlığı ve kanıtlanmış metodolojilerle birleştirerek, küresel olarak birden fazla sektörde müşterilerimize yenilikçi çözümler sunuyoruz. 150'den fazla yazılım uzmanıyla, yazılım geliştirme ve test hizmetleri sağlayarak dünyanın en iyi BT ve savunma şirketleriyle stratejik ortaklıklar kuruyoruz. GENEL NİTELİKLER Minimum 5 ve üstü yıl deneyimi Finans ve Crm iş kolunda geliştirme ve tasarım deneyimi sahibi olan Kurumsal ölçekte minimum bir Web dönüşüm projesinde uçtan uca yer almış olan SID veri tabanı modelleme bilgisine sahip İyi derecede PL/SQL ve SQL bilgisi ve geliştirme tecrübesi olan Soap Rest entegrayonlar konusunda tecrübeli Ekip çalışmasına yatkın ve birden fazla kişili ekiplerde çalışmış olan Sdlc agile scrum çalışma methodolojilerine hakım olma Jira confluence vs gibi süreç takip uygulamalarına hakim olma Ek Beklentiler: Katmanlı veri mimarisi olan altyapılar üzerinde çalışmış olan SOAP, Rest API vb. Web Servis teknolojiler konusunda bilgi ve deneyim sahibi olan Finans ve CRM Ekiplerinde Görev Alacak Kaynaklar için İyi derecede .Net C# bilgisi ve geliştirme tecrübesi olan Object Oriented mimariye hakim React bilgisi ve geliştirme tecrübesi olan TFS veya Git araçları ile çalışmış olmak TypeScript React geliştirme tecrübesi olan, SOA ve MicroService mimarisi hakkında bilgi sahibi ve tecrübe sahibi olmak

title: Full Stack Developer
description: Full-Stack Developer We’re looking for a Full Stack Developer to join our team at Entalpi. What you’ll be working on Digital transformation and data infrastructure projects of the largest corporations in the region. Design and develop end-to-end features for data platform applications (frontend and backend) Develop intuitive user interfaces for data exploration and visualization Collaborate with the backend, product, data, reporting and DevOps teams when needed. Ensure performance, reliability, and security of applications handling large datasets Participate in architecture discussions and contribute to technical decision-making Expected Qualifications 2+ years of experience in full stack development Bachelor's degree in Engineering, Computer Science, Coding, and Programming or applicable experience, Experience with at least one of Rails/Django/Laravel, Experience in modern Javascript and related web technologies and reporting/data visualization JS libraries, Ability to write clean and maintainable back-end code, Understanding of version control systems, namely Git, Self-motivated and communicative in remote environments. What we offer Being a part of a welcoming agile team, building cutting-edge global products for B2B and B2C. Remote friendly work environment Highly encouraged learning new tech & self-improvement opportunity About Entalpi Entalpi is a developer house that solves tech challenges, builds new products, and manages digital transformation projects for the largest corporations. We build cloud technologies, financial services, and optimization systems for critical problems. We’re an agile company, proud of our team, products, and work environment.

title: Backend Developer
description: Fuzul Holding ve grup şirketlerimize yönelik; CRM, ERP, CMS, Web ve Mobil uygulamalar geliştiren kurumsal bir yazılım ekibiyiz. Ölçeklenebilir, sürdürülebilir ve uzun vadeli ürünler tasarlıyor; iş süreçlerini teknolojiyle güçlendiriyoruz. Bu rolde; kullanıcı deneyimini ön planda tutan, veri odaklı çalışan ve ürünleşebilir yazılımları kurgulayıp yayına alabilen bir yaklaşım bekliyoruz. Karmaşık iş kurallarını doğru modelleyen, sistem içerisinde sorumluluk alan, veri akışını öngörülebilir ve yönetilebilir hale getiren çözümler üretmenizi hedefliyoruz. Geliştirilen uygulamaların performanslı, güvenli ve genişletilebilir olması temel önceliğimizdir. Kod kalitesi, mimari düşünce ve uzun vadeli sürdürülebilirlik bizim için vazgeçilmezdir. PR süreçlerine aktif katkı sağlamanızı ve teknik karar mekanizmalarında sorumluluk almanızı bekliyoruz. Aradığımız Nitelikler Zorunlu Bilgisayar Mühendisliği, Yazılım Mühendisliği, Matematik Mühendisliği veya ilgili mühendislik / sayısal bölümlerden mezun olmak En az 5 yıl backend geliştirme deneyimi .NET 8/9 ve Web API hakimiyeti MsSql deneyimi Entity Framework Core ile code-first yaklaşım deneyimi Clean / Onion Architecture bilgisi CQRS, Dependency Injection ve Repository Pattern bilgisi Git deneyimi Tercihen NestJS deneyimi Prisma ORM deneyimi ASP.NET Core SignalR / Socket.IO veya benzeri gerçek zamanlı iletişim teknolojileri RabbitMQ veya benzeri message broker deneyimi PostgreSQL deneyimi Microservices mimarisi deneyimi Redis veya benzeri caching sistemleri OpenTelemetry, Serilog gibi observability araçlarına aşinalık FluentValidation ile validation pipeline deneyimi Node.js, AWS Lambda, SQS deneyimi xUnit ile unit test / mimari test yazma deneyimi PDF generation veya template engine deneyimi (iText7, Handlebars, Scriban)

title: Full Stack Geliştirici (PHP / React) - On-Site
description: Hakkımızda Zirve Bilgisayar olarak, çevik ve yüksek hızlı hareket eden bir ekibiz. Yenilikçi fikirlerin bürokraside kaybolmadığı, süreçlerimizi sürekli iyileştirdiğimiz ve teknolojiyi yakından takip ettiğimiz bir mühendislik kültürü inşa ediyoruz. Rolün Kapsamı Çekirdek ekibimizin bir parçası olarak ofisimizde bizimle omuz omuza çalışacak; backend'den frontend'e uçtan uca mimari beklentileri anlayarak yüksek performanslı ve sürdürülebilir geliştirmeler yapacak bir Full Stack Geliştirici arıyoruz. Senden Neler Bekliyoruz? PHP ve modern framework'ler (Laravel, Symfony vb.) ile backend süreçlerinde ileri seviye deneyim. React ekosistemine hakimiyet ve modern frontend mimarileri kurgulayabilme becerisi. İlişkisel veri tabanları tasarımında ve yönetiminde ( MySQL veya PostgreSQL ) güçlü teknik tecrübe. Teknoloji dünyasındaki trendleri yakından takip etme, yeni araçları araştırma ve projelere uyarlama hevesi. Geliştirme sürecini dönüştüren "vibe coding" paradigmalarına ilgi duyma; Claude Code, Cursor veya Aider gibi araçları iş akışının merkezine koyarak yapay zeka ile otonom kodlama süreçlerine adapte olabilme. Yüz yüze iletişimi verimli kullanma, ofis içi dinamik mühendislik tartışmalarına ve mimari planlamalara yatkınlık. Artı Değer (Nice to Have): Vue.js bilgisi ve tecrübesi. Açık kaynak (Open Source) projelere katkıda bulunmuş olmak. Neden Zirve Bilgisayar? Hiyerarşinin değil, iyi fikrin ve inovasyonun kazandığı bir çalışma ortamı sunuyoruz. Gelişime açık altyapımızda yeni teknolojileri test edebilir, şirketimizin büyüme sürecinde doğrudan etki yaratarak kendini sürekli geliştirebilirsin. Sadece verilen işleri yapan değil, sürece katkı sağlayan biri olmak istiyorsan Ürün ve süreçleri sahiplenebileceğin bir rol arıyorsan Gelişime açık, öğrenmeyi seven ve sorumluluk almaktan çekinmeyen biriysen Küçük ama etkisi büyük bir ekipte yer almak sana daha cazip geliyorsa Neler Sunuyoruz? Dinamik ve büyüyen bir teknoloji ekibinde çalışma fırsatı Gerçek kullanıcıya dokunan, canlıda kullanılan ürünler geliştirme imkânı Sorumluluk alabileceğin ve fikirlerini hayata geçirebileceğin bir çalışma ortamı Kişisel ve mesleki gelişimi destekleyen yapı Açık iletişimin olduğu, hiyerarşinin minimumda tutulduğu ekip kültürü Çalışma Koşulları? Hafta içi 09.00-18.00 çalışma düzeni Planlı ve önceliklendirilmiş iş takibi Ekip içi düzenli iletişim ve koordinasyon İş-özel hayat dengesine önem veren yaklaşım

title: Full Stack Developer
description: İş Tanımı Şirketimiz bünyesinde yürütülen uluslararası ve/veya yurt içi projelerde görev alacak, deneyimli ve yetkin takım arkadaşları aramaktayız. Genel Nitelikler Bilgisayar Mühendisliği, Yazılım Mühendisliği veya ilgili bölümlerden mezun, İyi seviyede İngilizce okuma, yazma ve anlama becerisine sahip, Uluslararası veya yurt içi projelerde çalışma deneyimi bulunan, Ankara’da ikamet eden veya edebilecek , Yurt içi ve yurt dışı seyahat engeli bulunmayan, Kişi güvenlik belgesi alınmasına engel herhangi bir durumu bulunmayan. Teknik Deneyim ve Yetkinlikler A. Aranan Yetkinlikler En az 3 yıl yazılım geliştirme deneyimine sahip, Java Spring Framework (Spring Boot, Spring Cloud, Spring Security) ve Eksen Framework konularında tecrübeli, Angular, React.js, PrimeNG ve TypeScript ile frontend geliştirme deneyimi olan, Veri yapıları, nesne yönelimli tasarım ve programlama konularında bilgi sahibi, MongoDB ve PostgreSQL ile veritabanı tasarımı konusunda deneyimli, Mikroservis mimarisi , web servisleri ve Sürekli Entegrasyon (CI) süreçlerinde deneyim sahibi, Kafka ve RabbitMQ gibi mesajlaşma sistemleri hakkında bilgi sahibi, Yazılım mimarileri konusunda bilgi sahibi, Yazılım konfigürasyon ve kalite yönetimi süreçlerine hâkim, REST API ve JSON tabanlı uygulama geliştirme konusunda tecrübeli. B. Tercih Edilen Yetkinlikler Tercihen Kovan altyapısı konusunda deneyiminin olması, Docker ve Kubernetes ile geliştirme deneyimi olan, CSS ve Bootstrap ile arayüz geliştirme deneyimi bulunan, QueryDSL tecrübesine sahip, Git, DOORS, JIRA, Jenkins, Nexus, Harbor gibi yazılım yaşam döngüsü araçlarını kullanabilen, ArgoCD hakkında bilgi sahibi, Agile / Scrum metodolojileri konusunda deneyimli.

title: Senior Full Stack Developer
description: Görev Tanımı Claude Code ile günlük geliştirme süreçlerini yürütmek, hızlı ve kaliteli kod üretmek * ERP* projemizi devralarak planlama, geliştirme ve teslimat süreçlerini uçtan uca yönetmek Vibecoding ve AI destekli geliştirme araçları konusunda bilgi sahibi olmak ve kendini geliştirmek Projelerin önceliklendirme, planlama ve teslimat süreçlerini bağımsız yürütmek Kod incelemeleri yapmak, teknik kararlar almak ve dokümantasyon sürdürmek Birden fazla projeyi paralel yürütebilmek Ekip ile koordineli çalışmak Aranan Nitelikler Vibe coding ile proje geliştirme konusunda deneyimli Full stack alanında en az 5 yıllık profesyonel deneyim Modern JavaScript/TypeScript ekosisteminde güçlü hakimiyet (React, Next.js, Node.js vb.) RESTful API ve/veya GraphQL tasarımı ve geliştirme deneyimi Veritabanı deneyimi (PostgreSQL, MongoDB vb.) Git tabanlı iş akışlarına hakimiyet ERP veya büyük ölçekli iş uygulamaları geliştirme deneyimi Geliştirme süreçlerini hızlandıran araç ve teknolojilere hakimiyet (CI/CD, test otomasyon, proje yönetim araçları vb.) Birden fazla projeyi eş zamanlı yürütebilme ve önceliklendirebilme becerisi Proje süreçlerini bağımsız yönetebilme ve self-management becerisi Türkçe ve İngilizce iletişim yetkinliği - HAB OSB / Kahramankazan lokasyonunda hibrit çalışabilecek Tercih Sebepleri GitHub Copilot, Cursor gibi diğer AI destekli geliştirme araçlarında deneyim Gerçek zamanlı haberleşme uygulamaları (WebSocket, real-time messaging) deneyimi CI/CD pipeline ve DevOps pratikleri Mobil uygulama geliştirme deneyimi (React Native, Flutter) İnşaat veya saha yönetimi sektörüne aşinalık .Net Core kullanarak enterprise uygulamalar geliştirmiş olmak

title: Senior Backend Developer (Python)
description: About us: Talent has no borders. Proxify's mission is to connect top developers around the world with the opportunities they deserve. So, it doesn't matter where you are; we are here to help you fast-track your independent career in the right direction. Since our launch, Proxify's developers have successfully worked with 1200+ happy clients to build their products and growth features. 5000+ talented developers trust Proxify and its network to fulfill their dreams and objectives. Proxify is shaped by a global network of supportive, talented developers interested in remote full-time jobs. Our Glassdoor (4.5/5) and Trustpilot (4.8/5) ratings reflect the trust developers place in us and our commitment to our members' success. The Role: We are looking for a Senior Python Developer for one of our clients. You are a perfect candidate if you are growth-oriented, you love what you do, and you enjoy working on new ideas to develop exciting products. What we are looking for: 5+ years of experience building products with Python and Django. High proficiency in SQL with experience using databases like PostgreSQL. Experience scaling cloud infrastructures with Docker or Kubernetes is a plus. Experience managing cloud infrastructures, specifically AWS or GCP. You follow the best practices and conventions. Relevant experience in CI/CD and related tools. Ability to work with minimal supervision. Intermediate-advanced English level. You can communicate well with both technical and non-technical clients. Responsibilities: Ability to build libraries and frameworks of reusable efficient code. Competence in designing and implementing low-latency, stable and performing applications. Capacity to effectively collaborate with other team members and stakeholders remotely. Ability to implement data protection systems. Competence in data storage solutions. What we offer: Get paid, not played No more unreliable clients. Enjoy on-time monthly payments with flexible withdrawal options. Predictable project hours Enjoy a harmonious work-life balance with consistent 8-hour working days with clients. Flex days, so you can recharge Enjoy up to 24 flex days off per year without losing pay, for full-time positions found through Proxify. Career-accelerating positions at cutting-edge companies Discover exclusive long-term remote positions at the world's most exciting companies. Hand-picked opportunities just for you Skip the typical recruitment roadblocks and biases with personally matched positions. One seamless process, multiple opportunities A one-time contracting process for endless opportunities, with no extra assessments. Compensation Enjoy the same pay, every month with positions landed through Proxify.

title: Kıdemli Java Backend Developer
description: Şirket Hakkında : Etiqa, bilişim ve telekomünikasyon alanlarında müşteri odaklı hizmet, katma değerli servis ve en yenilikçi teknolojileri sunma prensiplerini yapı taşı olarak kabul ederek kurulmuş yeni nesil bilişim entegrasyonu firmasıdır. Kendini sürekli geliştirmeye ve yenilemeye adamış profesyonel ve deneyimli ekibi ile tüm kamu kurumları ve kurumsal şirketlere projelendirme, uygulama, satış, yazılım, danışmanlık, sanal gerçeklik ve Ar-Ge hizmetleri sunmaktadır. Kurumumuz tarafından üretilen ve geliştirilen bütün faaliyetlerimizin en temel amacı, hedef kitle ve ortamdaki ihtiyaçları en iyi şekilde analiz etmek, müşterilerimizin sorunlarını ve beklentilerini anlamak ve duruma en uygun çözüm önerileri ile katma değerli projeler geliştirmektir. Kurumumuz bünyesinde yürütülen Ar-Ge faaliyetleriyle, yenilikçi çözümler geliştirmek, yeni teknolojiler keşfetmek, müşteri ihtiyaçlarını karşılamak için yeni çözümler geliştirerek gelecekteki teknolojik trendleri ve müşteri ihtiyaçlarını öngörmeyi hedeflemekteyiz. Sorumluluklar: Bünyemizde devam etmekte olan java tabanlı projelerimizde görevlendirmek üzere takım içinde sorumluluk alarak dahil olduğu modüllerde mantıksal yorumlama yapabilecek ve görev bilinci ile takvime uygun geliştirme süreçlerini yönetebilecek takım arkadaşları arıyoruz. Nitelikler Java ile en az 3 yıl aktif geliştirme deneyimi Spring Boot ve mikroservis mimarileri konusunda deneyim REST ve SOAP tabanlı web servisleri geliştirme ve entegrasyon konularında bilgi sahibi Entity tanımlamalarında JPA/Hibernate ve Lombok gibi kütüphaneleri etkin kullanmış Oracle, MSSQL ve PostgreSQL veritabanlarıyla çalışmış, güçlü SQL bilgisine sahip Temiz kod prensiplerine (SOLID, DRY, vs.) uygun yazılım geliştirme alışkanlığı Docker ortamında geliştirme yapmış, tercihen container tabanlı mimarilerle çalışmış Git versiyon kontrol sistemi konusunda deneyimli Redis, Kafka gibi mesajlaşma/önbellekleme sistemleriyle deneyim Temel seviyede CI/CD süreçleri bilgisi Veritabanı modelleme, sorgu optimizasyonu ve veri güvenliği süreçlerine katkı Agile çalışma yapısına uygun olarak ekip içinde koordineli şekilde görev almak

title: Senior Backend Engineer
description: A Bit About Us... Please allow us to celebrate our own success for a moment... We've built a customer-centric product that is market-leading, and we are smashing it! We're a multi-award-winning digital payments and insight platform within the automotive industry. We work with over 5,000 automotive retailers, helping drivers to pay for motoring costs, accessories, and other services through a variety of different payment options. Our purpose is to build a solution that gives drivers peace of mind while enhancing customer experience and assisting with dealer profitability. Bumper is a fast-growing payments scale-up and we’re excited to continue building on our growth having completed a successful Series B funding round in 2024. We’re looking to hire a dynamic and passionate Senior Backend Engineer , based in Ankara . Our Head Office is in Sheffield City Centre, with offices also based in London and Turkey. We've also expanded further, bringing retailers in Ireland, Germany, Spain, and the Netherlands on board, with the vision of being the leading automotive payment and insights platform! As a Senior Backend Engineer, you will report directly to the Team Lead and play a key role in designing, developing, and maintaining our backend systems to ensure the functionality and scalability of our platform. Responsibilities Collaborating closely with teams to understand business requirements and translate them into technical solutions, Design, develop, and implement high-quality, scalable, and maintainable backend systems and APIs, Conducting code reviews to ensure code quality, performance, and adherence to best practices, Providing timely solutions to troubleshoot complex technical issues, debug them, and minimize their impact on the platform, Being able to divide work into small outputs and actively delegate work to more than one team member, Mentoring young engineers by encouraging a culture of continuous learning and growth within the team, Staying abreast of emerging technologies and industry trends by proposing and implementing innovative solutions to enhance the capabilities of our platform. Qualifications Having at least 5 years advanced knowledge of Django, Having at least 5 years advanced knowledge of Python, At least five years of experience working with SQL databases, Expert in software design principles and experience in REST APIs, Practice using Git and the ability to overcome technical problems encountered in Git, etc., Expert level knowledge of a functional area of Bumper or a language, framework, or part of the technology stack we use to build Bumper, Have strong oral and written communication skills in English. Now a Bit About You… We are a passionate and professional team, and we’re excited to welcome a Senior Backend Engineer who shares our vision of making Bumper the leading automotive payment and insights platform! In this role, you’ll have the opportunity to work in a dynamic, fast-paced environment where data-driven decision-making is at the heart of everything we do . You’ll play a key role in designing scalable systems, improving our architecture, and collaborating closely with cross-functional teams to deliver robust backend solutions. If you thrive on solving complex technical challenges, enjoy working with modern technologies, and have a proactive mindset for building efficient systems , we’d love to hear from you! What You'll Get From Us... Competitive Salary Private Health Insurance We give 26 days holiday + bank holidays, plus volunteer days throughout the year (pro-rated) £250 annually wellbeing allowance £200 monthly meal allowance to enjoy delicious food while you work your magic £150 annually development allowance £25 monthly budget to spend at our amazing team events – fun guaranteed! Our Bumper Flex policy for better work/life balance (3 days in office) Annual company-wide Bumper Retreat—a few days of fun, collaboration, and mingling(make sure your passport’s in date!) Perks are nice, but we know perks don’t make up the whole package of a great job. By joining our Bumper team, you'll have the opportunity to be an ambassador for our product & brand, and help us to continue on our winning streak!

title: Full Stack Engineer
description: MapperX, a pioneer in the renewable energy sector, is dedicated to providing revolutionary solutions in solar panel analysis and aims to enhance energy efficiency. Our software optimizes the performance of solar panels and improves energy production processes. We are looking for an experienced Full Stack Developer to join our team in Ankara and contribute to this vision. Qualifications: - Bachelor's degree in Computer Engineering or a related field - At least 2 years of experience in Full Stack Development - Advanced proficiency in React, Next.js (App Router, Server Components), and TypeScript - Strong knowledge of Node.js, Express.js, REST API design, and backend development - Solid experience with Firestore (NoSQL data modeling, queries, security rules) and Firebase Auth (JWT, OTP/2FA) - Proficiency in Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui, and Radix UI component-based development - Experience with state management using Zustand, TanStack Query, and React Hook Form with Zod validation - Solid understanding of Object-Oriented Programming (OOP) and SOLID principles - Familiarity with Google Cloud Platform, Firebase (Hosting, Functions, Storage), and Cloud Run technologies - Experience with Mapbox GL, Leaflet, or PostGIS for geospatial/map-based applications is a plus - Experience with payment gateway integration (Iyzico or similar 3D Secure flows) is a plus - Familiarity with internationalization frameworks (next-intl) for multi-language applications is a plus - Experience with SendGrid, TipTap/Monaco editors, or PDF generation (@react-pdf/renderer) is a plus Responsibilities: - Develop and maintain features across our customer-facing solar panel analysis platform, backend API, and internal admin panel - Build responsive, accessible UI components and implement REST API endpoints with proper authentication and authorization - Work with Firestore data models, integrate third-party services (payments, email, geospatial APIs), and support 11-language internationalization - Produce innovative software solutions and actively participate in projects that advance solar energy analytics If you are interested in contributing to projects that make a difference in the industry and want to be part of the energy transition, we invite you to apply. Qualified candidates will be invited for an interview. #FullStackDeveloper #ReactJS #NextJS #TypeScript #NodeJS #Firebase #Firestore #WebDevelopment #SoftwareEngineer #postgresql #BackendDeveloper #GoogleCloud #CloudRun #ankara

title: Principal Backend Engineer (Remote EMEA)
description: Location: Fully remote (EMEA timezone) Start date: ASAP Languages: Fluent English required Industry: Enterprise Software / AI / Data Infrastructure About The Role Pragmatike is recruiting on behalf of a fast-growing, AI-first enterprise software company building a next-generation semantic intelligence layer for large-scale business data. Their platform sits on top of complex enterprise systems and transforms fragmented, highly customized data into structured, business-meaningful information that AI systems can reliably understand and act on. By bridging the gap between raw enterprise data and AI, they enable more accurate automation, decision-making, and scalable intelligence across organizations. We are seeking a Senior Backend Engineer with strong experience in building data-intensive, production-grade systems. This is a highly technical, hands-on role focused on designing and owning core backend infrastructure that powers semantic data processing and intelligent applications. You will play a key role in shaping the platform from the ground up, working across data pipelines, backend services, and APIs. This position requires a strong product mindset, architectural ownership, and the ability to operate effectively in a fast-moving, early-stage environment. Your Responsibilities Design, build, and own backend systems that transform raw enterprise data into structured, business-meaningful representations Develop and maintain scalable data processing pipelines, semantic storage layers, and versioning systems Own features end-to-end, from data modeling and backend logic to API design and integration layers Make and defend architectural decisions, balancing long-term scalability with short-term execution speed Build robust, production-grade APIs and services to power internal and external applications Integrate modern AI tools into development workflows to accelerate implementation, testing, and documentation Collaborate closely with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality, impactful features Contribute to engineering best practices and help shape a scalable, maintainable platform architecture Required Qualifications 5+ years of experience as a Backend Engineer, Software Engineer, or Product Engineer in a SaaS or product-driven environment Strong experience building data-intensive or distributed systems in production Proficiency in backend development (e.g., Python, Java, or similar languages) Solid understanding of APIs, data modeling, and cloud-based architectures Experience working with modern cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, or Azure) and containerized environments Ability to make pragmatic technology choices based on problem context rather than fixed stack preferences Strong problem-solving skills and ability to break down complex systems into scalable solutions Clear communication skills, with the ability to explain technical decisions to both technical and non-technical stakeholders Collaborative mindset with a strong sense of ownership and accountability Experience using AI-assisted development tools in a practical, productivity-focused way Preferred Qualifications Experience with data pipelines, ETL/ELT systems, or large-scale data processing architectures Familiarity with semantic systems such as knowledge graphs, ontology mapping, or data catalogs Exposure to enterprise systems or complex ERP environments Experience with graph databases (e.g., Neo4j) or analytics platforms Background in AI/ML systems or integrating AI models into production workflows Previous experience in early-stage startups or building systems from scratch Why Join Us Build foundational technology enabling AI to operate reliably on complex enterprise data Take ownership of core backend systems in a high-impact, early-stage environment Work on technically challenging problems at the intersection of data, AI, and enterprise software Join a highly collaborative, product-focused team with strong engineering standards Gain exposure to cutting-edge approaches in semantic data modeling and AI integration Grow with a company that values transparency, ownership, and long-term impact Pragmatike is committed to a fair, transparent, and inclusive recruitment process. We do not discriminate based on age, disability, gender, gender identity or expression, marital or civil partner status, pregnancy or maternity, race, religion or belief, sex, or sexual orientation. In accordance with GDPR, your personal data will be processed lawfully, fairly, and securely, and used solely for recruitment purposes, including sharing it with our client(s) for employment consideration.

title: Senior Backend Engineer
description: Join us on our exciting journey at Dataroid, the award-winning digital analytics and customer engagement platform! Dataroid empowers leading brands to enhance every individual customer experience through deep customer insight, data science modelling, and omnichannel marketing. As Turkey's fastest-growing data analytics platform, we embrace challenges, explore new technologies, and aim to impact industries globally by helping businesses harness data to create seamless customer experiences. At Dataroid, our developers drive innovation, staying ahead of technology trends to deliver simple and seamless solutions. Already used by leading enterprises in finance, airlines, and retail, Dataroid reshapes the experience of over 500 million users. Dataroid is in search of a Senior Backend Engineer who will be responsible for the complete lifecycle of scalable, secure and well designed software products from research and design to implementation. You’ll be working closely with designers, analysts, quality assurance and other teams to translate each design into real-life products. Key Responsibilities Writing well designed, reusable, testable and secure code by applying best software development practices Designing and implementing low-latency, high-availability and performant applications Architecting well defined APIs for user facing elements developed by front end developers Collaborating in a multi-disciplinary team Participating and conducting code reviews Discovering, learning and implementing new technologies Mentoring junior team members in best practices Qualifications & Experience BSc/MSc/PhD degree in Computer Science or a related field or equivalent work experience At least 5+ years of professional software engineering experience in designing and building backend systems Proficiency with Java and Spring Framework (Boot, Data, Cloud, Security etc) Proficiency with OOP concepts, large-scale software architecture, networking and distributed system and UNIX/Linux environments Good understanding of fundamental design principles for a scalable application Experience with Service-oriented architecture, microservices, REST APIs and containerization (Docker, Kubernetes) Experience with Kafka Strong unit test and debugging skills Proficiency in code versioning tools such as Git Strong sense of analytical thinking and problem-solving skills Excellent attention to detail Highly Effective time management and multitasking skills Strong verbal and written communication skills Nice to have Experience with relational and non-relational data stores, key-value stores and search engines (Postgres, ScyllaDB, Druid, Hazelcast, Redis, Elasticsearch etc.) Experience in architecting, designing and implementing large scale systems Working knowledge with Amazon Web Services , Google Cloud Platform, Microsoft Azure and/or any other cloud computing service provider Experience or willing to learn large scale stream processing technologies Prior experience with SCRUM/Agile methodologies Why Dataroid? 🌟Great Compensation & Benefits: We provide an attractive compensation package, including private health insurance, company-supported pension plans, meal vouchers, commute assistance, remote work benefits, and a paid day off for your birthday. 💻Enhanced Workdays: Enjoy the flexibility of adaptable working hours. We offer online events, inspiring guest speakers, office snacks, a culture that limits unnecessary meetings, and many other perks designed to make your weekdays more enjoyable. 📚Growth & Learning: Your development is our priority, with access to premier online learning platforms like Udemy, digital libraries, and tailored training programs to support your career journey. 🚀Thriving Community: Be part of a vibrant and close-knit team that values connection. Enjoy happy hours, workshops, seasonal celebrations, and other events that bring us together. 🎯Open Dialogue: Our flat organizational structure fosters direct and transparent communication. Your ideas and feedback are always welcome, ensuring your voice is heard and valued. FIND MORE ABOUT US 🔎 Our career page: https://www.dataroid.com/careers/ Our company page: https://www.dataroid.com/ We will process your personal data as part of our recruitment procedures. To find out more, please consult our Candidate Privacy Notices. We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

title: AI - Native Full Stack Developer
description: AI-Native Full Stack Developer At Panteon, we are looking for Full Stack Developer teammates who strive for continuous self-improvement, radiate high energy, and have truly integrated AI tools into their production workflow. What We Expect? Enthusiasm for developing a high-traffic Business Intelligence (BI) tool that manages data across multiple applications. Full contribution to the creative process. An entrepreneurial mindset, high energy, motivation, and a strong sense of ownership. Being an excellent team player. Ability to work fast and efficiently. At least 3 years of professional work experience in this field. Ability to find fast and effective solutions to challenging problems. Proficiency in JavaScript. Knowledge and experience in NodeJS and React. Experience with database systems such as PostgreSQL, Redis, etc. Knowledge and experience with Amazon Web Services (AWS) or similar cloud services. Advanced level of English. Daily production experience with AI-assisted development tools (Claude Code, Cursor, etc.) — we are looking for genuine usage habits, not just familiarity with the names. Ability to critically review AI output — never merging code without understanding it and questioning why a specific suggestion was made. Making your thought process visible while working with AI; ability to explain the reasoning behind decisions. Clarity and context management in prompt engineering; knowing how to ask the right questions the right way. What Will You Do? Work as part of our team in collaboration with Marketing and Game Design teams. Take part in the development process of a high-traffic BI tool. Ensure requirements are implemented effectively. Write error-free and sustainable code. Actively use AI tools in your daily development process — how you use them, when you use them, and what you choose to do yourself is important to us. Take responsibility for the quality and accuracy of the generated code; AI is the tool, you are the engineer. Work hard, learn a lot, and have plenty of fun with the team. What Will You Learn? Develop your skills by working on a scalable server architecture capable of handling high user volumes. Learn to process Big Data with high performance. Gain experience by tackling challenging problems. Master team collaboration, collective action, and knowledge sharing. Understand how AI tools are used within a real product team — which decisions are made by AI and where human judgment is mandatory. Practice making secure, sustainable changes in large codebases using AI and understanding its limitations. What We Offer? A comprehensive meal card covering all your food expenses. Private health insurance package. Subscriptions for Netflix, YouTube, Spotify, or Exxen. Fun company events and organizations. A strong team and work culture. The experience of working at one of the most established firms in the industry. If you want to be a part of our team, you can send us your CV.

title: Senior Software Engineer (PHP & Python)
description: IGENAS Yapay Zekâ Yazılım Ltd. Şti. | Ankara (Gölbaşı) | Hybrid IGENAS is seeking an experienced Senior Software Engineer to support the sustainability and structured growth of its ongoing software projects. This role requires a high level of ownership and the ability to work independently, taking full responsibility for development processes end-to-end. Responsibilites Develop and maintain PHP and Python-based applications Analyze and improve existing systems and workflows Design and implement new technical solutions based on project needs Manage development processes independently Qualifications Bachelor’s degree in Computer Engineering, Software Engineering, or a related field Minimum 3 years of professional experience in software development Strong proficiency in PHP and Python Experience in backend development and system architecture Strong analytical thinking and problem-solving skills Ability to work independently with a high sense of responsibility Currently residing in Ankara Compensation & Work Setup Location: Ankara (Gölbaşı) Work model: Hybrid Salary: 75,000 – 85,000 TRY / month Additional Note This position will remain open until a suitable candidate is hired.
